blocks.body: Inversion and cleft sentences are powerful tools for emphasis in English.

{ "title": "8. Brief synopsis", "items": [ "Inversion: Neg adverb + Aux + S + V (Never have I seen...).", "It-cleft: It was/is + X + who/that (It was you who...).", "What-cleft: What + clause + is/was (What I need is...).", "Fronting: bringing an element to the beginning for emphasis.", "Emphatic do: S + do/does/did + base V for emphasis.", "These structures are typical of formal and written English." ] }
